encounter.reason: Annual wellness exam; cervical cancer screening (Pap smear)
encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

screening.name: AHC HRSN screening — food insecurity domain
screening.item: Within the past 12 months, the food you bought just didn't last and you didn't have money to get more

screening.name: AHC HRSN screening — overall result
screening.note: Near-positive on food insecurity domain (1 item endorsed); negative on housing instability, utilities, transportation, and interpersonal safety domains

medications.name: albuterol sulfate 90 mcg/actuation HFA metered-dose inhaler
medications.sig: inhale 2 puffs by mouth as needed for shortness of breath or wheezing

document_references.description: Documents annual wellness exam for 42-year-old female including vitals, PHQ-2 screening (negative), ACT score (well controlled asthma), AHC HRSN screening (near-positive food insecurity, below referral threshold), physical exam findings, Pap smear collection (overdue since 2018), breast cancer screening discussion deferred to age 42-44, albuterol refill, and lab orders for CBC, CMP, lipid panel, and HbA1c.

diagnostic_reports.description: Ordered as part of routine metabolic risk assessment given BMI and family history of diabetes. Patient to complete fasting labs at clinic lab. Results not yet available.

Ordered to screen for prediabetes/diabetes given BMI in overweight range and family history of type 2 diabetes (mother). Results not yet available.
Pap smear collected at this encounter. Last cervical cytology screening was 2018; patient was overdue. Cervix appeared normal on visual inspection. Specimen sent to lab. Results pending.
